article.title: UBER SE-2 Hiring Clarification
article.content:
I recently completed 6 interview rounds for an SE-2 role at Uber.

From the recruiter’s update:

HLD/System Design round feedback was “Lean Hire” / “Soft No”
Remaining rounds were positive
Overall verdict was mentioned as “Borderline Hire”
They also said they are trying for team matching

I wanted to understand from people who have gone through a similar process:

Does “borderline hire” usually still have a realistic chance of converting to an offer?
If team matching is happening, does that generally mean I’m still in consideration?
At what point should I consider it a rejection if there’s no update?

Would appreciate honest insights from interviewers/candidates who experienced similar situations at Uber or other top tech companies.

post.content: Can you please share your experience and each round's expectation ?

this is a very good sign IMO .. 

I had similar reviews ( below expectation in 1 round and OK / good  in others ) but I was given an offer  after around 1 month of last round.

You just hope they don't find another candidate quickly and close the position.

Best wishes.

--------

Just in case you don't get it, keep in touch with recruiter and if you see any other role opening similar to what you interviewed for, just message them... such good reviews in interview will get you another chance to interview very easily. They keep a record of your candidature with them for future .
